creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Unless a new mentor explicitly requests review of the very first traditional patches [1], the mentee may not realise that they require approval!

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/committers-guide/conventions.html

Fix: 

http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/committers-guide-mentor-approval.patch.txt

Rendered: http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/committers-guide-mentor-approval.html

[if you don't want the hassle of committing this, I'll take a bounce to me as approval]
